_meta.title: MarioTrickster 蒸馏知识库
_meta.source: PROMPT_RECIPES.md 全量蒸馏 + trickster_style LoRA 实测结论 + PDF 书籍蒸馏
_meta.description: 驱动首次出图参数优化、Prompt 增强和智能质检的统一知识源。管线自动热加载。
_meta.how_to_add: 上传 PDF 后蒸馏结论按分区追加，管线下次运行自动生效。

style._doc: 画风定义：以 trickster_style LoRA 实测结论为准
style.visual_identity: 清晰黑色线稿边界、平涂色块、明亮高饱和配色、插画化2D游戏资产
style.positive_base: masterpiece, best quality, 2D side-scroller game sprite, (thick black outlines:1.3), (hand-drawn ink outlines:1.2), (cel shading:1.2), (flat color fill:1.1), (limited color palette:1.1), (simplified shadow 2-tone:1.2), warm natural color scheme, bright saturated colors, game asset, trickster_style
style.negative_base: (worst quality:1.4), (low quality:1.4), blurry, gradient shading, realistic, photorealistic, 3D render, smooth airbrush, no outlines, soft edges, text, watermark, oversaturated, HDR, lens flare, bloom, red roof, cone roof, isometric, top-down view, bird eye view, orange brick, small character, tiny figure

color.palette: limited warm, bright saturated, earthy tones

style.outline: thick black ink outlines with weight variation (CSI: C/S=organic, I=traps/artificial)

animation_rules._doc: 核心动画规则（蒸馏自 PROMPT_RECIPES.md 抽屉3 + PDF书籍）
animation_rules.anti_slide: 角色重心锁死 Bottom Center (0.5,0)，最高优先级
animation_rules.controlnet: 所有带连续动作的生物关节角色强制 DWPose/OpenPose

contrapposto.rule: 对立力量，上下半身反向

arc_of_motion.rule: 所有身体部位沿弧线运动，禁止线性插值

loa.rule: Line of Action=全身贯穿1条印象线，最先决定

follow_through.rule: 软体附属物延迟2-3帧(发/披风/裙)
follow_through.tags: hair follow-through, cloth wave propagation, flowing cape

anticipation.rule: 所有快速动作必须有预备帧
anticipation.attack: 蓄力2-3帧慢→打击1-2帧极快→收势1帧慢

animation_rules.loop_closure: 循环动画末帧无缝接首帧，等间距
animation_rules.spacing: 加速=疏→密, 减速=密→疏, 循环=等距

gravity_tilt.rule: 完美平衡=静止, 微倾=即将动, 大倾=激烈运动
gravity_tilt.tags: dynamic pose, tilted center of gravity

animation_rules.weight_1_5x: 重物画1.5倍大，身体无间隙接触，膝盖弯曲降重心

actions._doc: 每个动作的蒸馏知识 + Mixamo 预设（合并自 mixamo_presets.json）

idle.boost: subtle chest rise and fall, gentle weight shift, relaxed fingers slightly apart, natural S-curve pose, contrapposto weight on one leg

walk.boost: heel-to-toe foot roll, opposite arm swing, vertical bounce at passing, trailing heel kicks up backward in arc, forward lean, torso counter-rotation, hair follow-through

run.boost: dynamic leg extension knee bend over 90deg, vigorous arm swing, forward lean greater than walk, aerial phase both feet off ground, bow-shaped body, neck hidden in shoulders, strong follow-through

jump.boost: clear anticipation squat before takeoff with forward lean, stretched body at apex arms assisting upward, compressed landing deep knee bend, squash at crouch stretch at apex, arc trajectory

attack_sword.boost: wind-up pull back with body twist, wide arc sword swing, impact freeze frame, weight shift back to front foot, sword tip traces wide arc, 80pct arm extension at max impact

death.boost: hit stagger freeze, accelerating fall slow-in, ground contact bounce squash, final rest stable, follow-through hair clothes during fall

dash.boost: extreme forward lean 30-45deg, exaggerated arm swing much larger than run, rapid stride, bow-shaped body extreme speed, speed lines, strong follow-through, center of gravity far ahead of toes

smoke.rule: 球状山部上传递+均等间距+轮廓一致, 扩散→粒子化→消失

fire.rule: 6帧循环+整体轮廓不变+内部随机, core=white/yellow→mid=orange→outer=red
fire.tags: fire white yellow core, flame S-curve flicker

explosion.rule: 花形轮廓+散射平衡+大小变化, flash→fire→smoke
explosion.tags: explosion flower silhouette, flash then fire then smoke

water.rule: V型飛沫→水柱→王冠拡散→水滴分離→同心円波紋

lighting.three_light_wf: Step1:直接光2色塗り分け → Step2:反射光(shadow蓝调) → Step3:透過光/SSS
lighting.metal_3_rules: 明暗コントラスト強い + ハイライト極端に明るい + 明暗境界はっきり

wind.rule: front cling, back flow, lean into wind, ALL direction unified
wind.neg: inconsistent wind direction, hair blowing different directions

retune.crop: expand canvas per action aspect ratio, max 832
retune.consistency: steps += ceil((diff-threshold)/5)*2, max 20; steps>=12 still bad → check drive video
retune.color: strengthen style prompt anchors; shift>60 → prompt accuracy issue
retune.anim_defect: inject core rule prompt_tags for detected defect type
